'''mahadha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zakouska|zakouska]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-h-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zakouska|zakouska]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| mahadha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:mæhædhæth|mæhædhæth]] || [[word:mæhædhæj|mæhædhæj]] || [[word:mæhædhæsh|mæhædhæsh]] || [[word:mæhædhæ|mæhædhæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:mahahadhath|mahahadhath]] || [[word:mahahadhaj|mahahadhaj]] || [[word:mahahadhash|mahahadhash]] || [[word:mahahadha|mahahadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:mahadhath|mahadhath]] || [[word:mahadhaj|mahadhaj]] || [[word:mahadhash|mahadhash]] || [[word:mahadha|mahadha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:mahafdhath|mahafdhath]] || [[word:mahafdhaj|mahafdhaj]] || [[word:mahafdhash|mahafdhash]] || [[word:mahafdhaf|mahafdhaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mahadhatha|mahadhatha]] || [[word:mahadhaja|mahadhaja]] || [[word:mahadhasha|mahadhasha]] || [[word:mahadhaka|mahadhaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mahadhath|mahadhath]] || [[word:mahadhaj|mahadhaj]] || [[word:mahadhash|mahadhash]] || [[word:mahadha|mahadha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mahadhathal|mahadhathal]] || [[word:mahadhajal|mahadhajal]] || [[word:mahadhashal|mahadhashal]] || [[word:mahadhakal|mahadhakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mahadhathatha|mahadhathatha]] || [[word:mahadhajaja|mahadhajaja]] || [[word:mahadhashasha|mahadhashasha]] || [[word:mahadhaka|mahadhaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mahadhathan|mahadhathan]] || [[word:mahadhajan|mahadhajan]] || [[word:mahadhashan|mahadhashan]] || [[word:mahadhakan|mahadhakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mahadhathaoro|mahadhathaoro]] || [[word:mahadhajaoro|mahadhajaoro]] || [[word:mahadhashaoro|mahadhashaoro]] || [[word:mahadhakaoro|mahadhakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
